prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海综合类最低位次分别为约7531名、6996名、7651名、7218名、6602名，整体呈波动走势，近3年（2023→2024→2025）先降后升，2025年位次6602 为近5年最优（数字最小），反映当年报考热度较高；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021–2025年均为10人，2026年计划缩至9人，较2025年减少1人（ 缩招10%），计划缩减对竞争有一定收紧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学（威海）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，共享山东大学本部学科资源；软科中国大学排名中山 东大学主榜稳居第22名，学校层次高、品牌认可度强；山东大学2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面（主要源于2019年学伴事件遗留舆情），但抖音热度排名第20 （高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度不低；历史投档异常方面，2022年陕西断档、2024年四川理科调档线下降63分，但上海地区未见明显断档记录；山 东大学拥有数学A+、中国语言文学A、外国语言文学A、控制科学与工程A、马克思主义理论A等一批A类学科，威海校区开设的经济学类、电子信息类、自动化类等专业与本部优势 学科（应用经济学A-、控制科学与工程A、电子科学与技术A-）高度关联，学科实力有保障。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024–2025年持续高热推荐，计算机类 保持推荐热度，经济学类分化观望；上海2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35%，竞争压力显著上升；山东大学（威海）位于山东省威海市，对上海考生而言属于跨省就读，威海校区在沪招生规模较小（常年10人左右），地域偏 好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次6602为近5年最优的反弹压力、2026年招生计划缩招10%的收紧效应、以及上海考生总数大幅增加约35%带来的竞争加剧，三者共同 作用下竞争总体加剧；预测2026年最低位次约6406名，区间5906–6906名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（智能工程新工科实验班）（含计算机科学与技术、电子科学与技术、机器人工程、低空技术与工程专业）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 物理学类（含物理学专业）
- 经济学类（含国际经济与贸易、金融学（数智金融方向）、金融学（保险科技方向）专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无其他低分专业（该校在上海仅招4个专业/类，各专业分差较小，三档可参考经济学类中位次相对靠后的方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约6406名，区间5906–6906名。建议位次在区间中上段（约6200名以内）的考生以电子信息类、数学类为一档冲刺目标；位次在区间中段（约6400名）的考生以经济学类 、物理学类为稳妥选择；位次在区间下段（约6800名以外）的考生可重点考虑经济学类作为保底。该校在沪招生专业均为热门工科与经管方向，学科评估支撑强，值得报考。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Shanghai Comprehensive category were approximately 7531, 6996, 7651, 7218, and 6602 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend. In the recent three years (2023→2024→2025), it first decreased and then increased, with the 2025 ranking of 6602 being the best (smallest number) in the past five years, reflecting higher application popularity that year. The university's enrollment plan for Shanghai Comprehensive category was 10 students each year from 2021 to 2025, but in 2026 the plan is reduced to 9 students, a decrease of 1 student (10% reduction) compared to 2025, which tightens competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University (Weihai) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, sharing the disciplinary resources of the main Shandong University campus. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, Shandong University's main campus is firmly ranked 22nd, indicating a high university level and strong brand recognition. Shandong University's reputation evaluation for the 2026 Gaokao cycle is slightly negative (mainly due to the lingering public opinion from the 2019 study partner incident), but its Douyin popularity ranks 20th (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms, so application attention is not low. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there was a gap in Shaanxi in 2022 and a 63-point drop in the science cutoff score in Sichuan in 2024, but no obvious gap records in Shanghai. Shandong University has a number of A-level disciplines, including Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, and Marxist Theory A. The Weihai campus offers majors such as Economics, Electronic Information, and Automation, which are highly correlated with the main campus's advantageous disciplines (Applied Economics A-, Control Science and Engineering A, Electronic Science and Technology A-), ensuring strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors have been consistently hot and recommended from 2024 to 2025, Computer majors maintain recommendation popularity, and Economics majors are differentiated and wait-and-see. The total number of Shanghai Gaokao candidates in 2026 is approximately 66,700, an increase of about 35% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly increasing competitive pressure. Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, which is an inter-provincial study destination for Shanghai candidates. The Weihai campus has a small enrollment scale in Shanghai (around 10 students per year), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the rebound pressure from the 2025 ranking of 6602 being the best in five years, the tightening effect of a 10% enrollment reduction in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a significant increase of about 35% in the total number of Shanghai candidates, overall competition is intensified. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 6406, with a range of 5906 to 6906.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Electronic Information (Intelligent Engineering New Engineering Experimental Class) (including Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Science and Technology, Robotics Engineering, Low-Altitude Technology and Engineering)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Physics (including Physics)
- Economics (including International Economics and Trade, Finance (Digital Finance Direction), Finance (Insurance Technology Direction)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- No other low-score majors (the university only recruits 4 majors/classes in Shanghai, with small score differences between majors; for Tier 3, refer to the relatively lower-ranking direction within Economics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 6406, range 5906–6906. It is recommended that candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (within about 6200) target Electronic Information and Mathematics as Tier 1 sprint goals; candidates with rankings in the middle part (about 6400) choose Economics and Physics as safe options; candidates with rankings in the lower part (outside about 6800) can focus on Economics as a backup. The majors recruited by this university in Shanghai are all popular engineering and economics/management directions, with strong disciplinary evaluation support, making it worth applying.
